category_sources: source_facts.description says visually compare two PDF files; official README says diff-pdf is a tool for visually comparing two PDFs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is diff-pdf; official repository and homepage use diff-pdf.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub Pages site; official GitHub README contains usage and build documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/vslavik/diff-pdf; per instruction, returned repo as null and did not second-guess it.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README both describe visual PDF comparison; official README documents command-line usage and optional visual diff output.
